creator: kd5ob@mmcable.com
text:
StartX using KDE interface.
Set up any KDE screensaver with password protection.
Wait for screensaver to come on.
Attempt to re-enter desktop by entering your password.
You can't re-enter as it doesn't seem to be hooked up
to the password database.

Fix: 

Somewhere we are either not hooking KDE up to the FreeBSD passwords
for the user accounts OR perhaps, KDE can't read these password files?
How-To-Repeat: Use any KDE screensaver with password protection.
Allow screensaver to come on.
Attempt to re-access desktop by using your password.
